tools.name: authorization.generateTokenV2
tools.description: Returns an OAuth access token or a refresh token. You must pass a valid access token in the header of each API call.

tools.name: authorization.revokeRefreshTokenV2
tools.description: Delete a Refresh Token

tools.name: checkApiUsage.getApiUsagePlansV2
tools.description: Returns prediction usage on a monthly basis for the current calendar month and future months. Each apiusage object in the response corresponds to a calendar month in your plan.

tools.name: languageDatasets.deleteDataset
tools.description: Deletes the specified dataset and associated labels and examples.

tools.name: languageDatasets.get
tools.description: Returns the status of a language dataset or model deletion. When you delete a dataset or model, the deletion may not occur immediately. Use this call to find out when the deletion is complete.

tools.name: languageDatasets.getDataset
tools.description: Returns a single dataset.

tools.name: languageDatasets.listDatasets
tools.description: Returns a list of datasets and their labels that were created by the current user. The response is sorted by dataset ID.

tools.name: languageDatasets.uploadDatasetAsync
tools.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .csv, .tsv, or .json file. The call returns immediately and continues to upload data in the background.

tools.name: languageDatasets.uploadDatasetSync
tools.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .csv, .tsv, or .json file. The call returns after the dataset is created and all of the data is uploaded.

tools.name: languageExamples.getExamples
tools.description: Returns all the examples for the specified dataset,

tools.name: languageExamples.getExamplesByLabel
tools.description: Returns all the examples for the specified label. Returns both uploaded examples and feedback examples.

tools.name: languageExamples.provideFeedback
tools.description: Adds a feedback example to the dataset associated with the specified model.

tools.name: languageExamples.updateDatasetAsync
tools.description: Adds examples from a .csv, .tsv, or .json file to a dataset.

tools.name: languageModels.deleteModel
tools.description: Deletes the specified model.

tools.name: languageModels.getTrainedModelLearningCurve
tools.description: Returns the metrics for each epoch in a model.

tools.name: languageModels.getTrainedModelMetrics
tools.description: Returns the metrics for a model

tools.name: languageModels.getTrainedModels
tools.description: Returns all models for the specified dataset.

tools.name: languagePrediction.intentMultipart
tools.description: Returns an intent prediction for the given string.

tools.name: languagePrediction.sentimentMultipart
tools.description: Returns a sentiment prediction for the given string.

tools.name: languageTraining.getTrainStatusAndProgress
tools.description: Returns the status of a model's training process. Use the progress field to determine how far the training has progressed. When training completes successfully, the status is SUCCEEDED and the progress is 1.

tools.name: languageTraining.retrain
tools.description: Retrains a dataset and updates a model. Use this API call when you want to update a model and keep the model ID instead of creating a new model.

tools.name: languageTraining.train
tools.description: Trains a dataset and creates a model.

tools.name: visionDatasets.createDataset
tools.description: Creates a dataset and labels, if they're specified.

tools.name: visionDatasets.deleteDataset1
tools.description: Deletes the specified dataset and associated labels and examples.

tools.name: visionDatasets.get1
tools.description: Returns the status of an image dataset or model deletion. When you delete a dataset or model, the deletion may not occur immediately. Use this call to find out when the deletion is complete.

tools.name: visionDatasets.getDataset1
tools.description: Returns a single dataset.

tools.name: visionDatasets.listDatasets1
tools.description: Returns a list of datasets and their labels that were created by the current user. The response is sorted by dataset ID.

tools.name: visionDatasets.uploadDatasetAsync1
tools.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .zip file. The call returns immediately and continues to upload the images in the background.

tools.name: visionDatasets.uploadDatasetSync1
tools.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .zip file. The call returns after the dataset is created and all of the images are uploaded.

tools.name: visionExamples.addExample
tools.description: Adds an example with the specified label to a dataset.

tools.name: visionExamples.getExamples1
tools.description: Returns all the examples for the specified dataset. By default, returns examples created by uploading them from a .zip file.

tools.name: visionExamples.getExamplesByLabel1
tools.description: Returns all the examples for the specified label. Returns both uploaded examples and feedback examples.

tools.name: visionExamples.provideFeedback1
tools.description: Adds a feedback example to the dataset associated with the specified model.

tools.name: visionExamples.updateDatasetAsync1
tools.description: Adds feedback examples to the dataset associated with the specified object detection model.

tools.name: visionExamples.updateDatasetAsync2
tools.description: Adds examples from a .zip file to a dataset. You can use this call only with a dataset that was created from a .zip file.

tools.name: visionModels.deleteModel1
tools.description: Deletes the specified model.

tools.name: visionModels.getTrainedModelLearningCurve1
tools.description: Returns the metrics for each epoch in a model.

tools.name: visionModels.getTrainedModelMetrics1
tools.description: Returns the metrics for a model

tools.name: visionModels.getTrainedModels1
tools.description: Returns all models for the specified dataset.

tools.name: visionPrediction.detectMultipart
tools.description: Returns labels, probabilities, and bounding box coordinates for items detected in the specified local image file.

tools.name: visionPrediction.ocrMultipart
tools.description: Returns a prediction from an OCR model for the specified image URL or local image file.

tools.name: visionPrediction.predictMultipart
tools.description: Returns a prediction from an image or multi-label model for the specified image.

tools.name: visionTraining.getTrainStatusAndProgress1
tools.description: Returns the status of a model's training process. Use the progress field to determine how far the training has progressed. When training completes successfully, the status is SUCCEEDED and the progress is 1.

tools.name: visionTraining.retrain1
tools.description: Retrains a dataset and updates a model. Use this API call when you want to update a model and keep the model ID instead of creating a new model.

tools.name: visionTraining.train1
tools.description: Trains a dataset and creates a model.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
